name: Ironsinger
additional_info: Ironsing mantras apply stacks of Metal Rods on targets. Pressing [X] will pull affected towards you, with the strength of the pull depending on the amount of Metal Rods present. You cannot apply more than 5 Metal Rods to one target, unless you have one of the Rending Needle Talents.
desc: Grants you the ability to command Metal as an Ironsinger. Press X to Pull on Metal Rods.
